name: Initial Outreach Script
scriptText: Hi {{first_name}}, this is [Agent Name] from LoanBud. I noticed your listing and wanted to personally reach out about our fast approval process. Please call me back at [Phone Number] when you get a chance. Talk soon!

name: Follow-up Script
scriptText: Hi {{first_name}}, this is [Agent Name] from LoanBud following up on my earlier message about {{listing_name}}. I'd love to connect — please call [Phone Number] at your convenience. Have a great day!

name: Re-engagement Script
scriptText: Hi {{first_name}}, this is [Agent Name] from LoanBud. It's been a while since we last connected and I wanted to reach out one more time. We may have options that fit your current situation — give me a call at [Phone Number]. Thanks!
